outline.title: Understanding Prophecy
outline.summary: Welcome to the Understanding Prophecy course. This course explores the spiritual gift of receiving and communicating messages from God, including divine insight, future events, and spiritual guidance within a Christian theological framework.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Objectives
outline.summary: By the end of this course, you will understand the biblical foundations of prophecy, the office and gift of prophecy, and how to recognize and respond to prophetic messages in your spiritual journey.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: This course covers the history of prophecy in Scripture, the role of prophets in the Old and New Testament, the distinction between the office and gift of prophecy, and practical guidance for discerning prophetic words.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: The course consists of 10 comprehensive lessons covering biblical foundations, theological principles, and practical applications. Each lesson includes video content, reading materials, and interactive quizzes to reinforce your learning.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Your Learning Journey
outline.summary: Dedicate time each week to engage with the material, reflect on the biblical principles, and apply them to your spiritual life. Upon completion, you will receive a CPD-accredited certificate recognizing your theological achievement.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
